
---
title: "Figure_1_Table_1-2"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
easypackages::libraries(c(
  "readr", "readxl", "dplyr", "tidyr", "ggplot2",
  "ggpubr", "forcats", "here"
))

# Project paths
# This assumes the repository has been cloned and this notebook is being run
# from within the Persistence-of-Memory project.
directory_path <- here::here()
folder_path <- paste0(directory_path, "/Supplemental Tables/") # folder containing downloaded data sets
folder_path_save <- paste0(directory_path, "/Figure_Panels_for_Illustrator/") # change to desired folder to save image to

# Load data
combined_metadata_dist <- read_csv(paste0(folder_path,"Data Table S1.csv"))
all_zs_combined <- read_csv(paste0(folder_path,"Data Table S2.csv"))
all_hits_combined <- read_csv(paste0(folder_path,"Data Table S3.csv"))
Viral_Annotations <- read_csv(paste0(folder_path,"Data Table S4.csv"))

subset_frame_fxn <- function(wide_df, sample_metadata, dataset_lab) {
  sample_list <- sample_metadata$identifier[which(sample_metadata[[dataset_lab]] == TRUE)]
  filtered_df <- wide_df %>% dplyr::select(c(id, sample_list))
  return(filtered_df)
}

pal1 <- c(
  "#F87E2E", "#FFEC33", "#1FAA79", "#14C4F8", "#0077C8",
  "#9870F5", "#D53EE1", "#FF36B0", "#D72638", "#6E6E6E"
)
```

# Table 1

```{r}
combined_metadata_dist %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cohort) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_samples = max(row_number()),
    n_donors = length(unique(donor)),
    min_age = min(Age_Years),
    max_age = max(Age_Years)
  )
```

# Define Cohorts to Prepare for Fig. 1B and Table 2

```{r}
temp_dat <- combined_metadata_dist %>%
  dplyr::filter(adult_long == TRUE | ped_long_1 == TRUE | ped_long_2 == TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(color_label = ifelse(ped_long_1 == TRUE, "Pediatric longitudinal 1", "blah")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(color_label = ifelse(ped_long_2 == TRUE, "Pediatric longitudinal 2", color_label)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(color_label = ifelse(adult_long == TRUE, "Adult longitudinal", color_label)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(longgroup = "longitudinal") %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    combined_metadata_dist %>%
      dplyr::filter(adult_cross == TRUE | ped_cross == TRUE) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(color_label = ifelse(ped_cross == TRUE, "Pediatric cross-sectional", "blah")) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(color_label = ifelse(adult_cross == TRUE, "Adult cross-sectional", color_label)) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(longgroup = "cross-sectional", donor = "cross_sectional")
  )

temp_ord <- temp_dat %>%
  dplyr::group_by(donor) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Age_Years) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(tempvar = row_number()) %>%
  dplyr::filter(tempvar == 1)

temp_dat <- temp_dat %>%
  dplyr::mutate(donor = factor(donor, levels = c(temp_ord$donor))) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(donor, Age_Years)
```

# Table 2

```{r}
# Pediatric Longitudinal 1
temp_dat %>%
  dplyr::filter(color_label == "Pediatric longitudinal 1") %>%
  dplyr::select(c(donor, Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(female = ifelse(Sex == "Female", 1, 0)) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(perc_F = 100 * sum(female) / max(row_number()))

# Pediatric Longitudinal 2
temp_dat %>%
  dplyr::filter(color_label == "Pediatric longitudinal 2") %>%
  dplyr::select(c(donor, Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(female = ifelse(Sex == "Female", 1, 0)) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(perc_F = 100 * sum(female) / max(row_number()))

# Adult cross-sectional
temp_dat %>%
  dplyr::filter(color_label == "Adult cross-sectional") %>%
  dplyr::select(c(identifier, Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(female = ifelse(Sex == "Female", 1, 0)) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(perc_F = 100 * sum(female) / max(row_number()))

# Pediatric cross-sectional
temp_dat %>%
  dplyr::filter(color_label == "Pediatric cross-sectional") %>%
  dplyr::select(c(identifier, Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(female = ifelse(Sex == "Female", 1, 0)) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(perc_F = 100 * sum(female) / max(row_number()))

# Adult longitudinal
temp_dat %>%
  dplyr::filter(color_label == "Adult longitudinal") %>%
  dplyr::select(c(donor, Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(female = ifelse(Sex == "Female", 1, 0)) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(perc_F = 100 * sum(female) / max(row_number()))

# Age distribution, number of samples, and number of donors
temp_dat %>%
  dplyr::group_by(color_label) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_samples = max(row_number()),
    n_donors = length(unique(donor)),
    min_age = min(Age_Years),
    max_age = max(Age_Years)
  )
```

# Figure 1B

```{r, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=7}
temp_dat$category_reversed <- forcats::fct_rev(temp_dat$longgroup)

# Pediatric panel
fig1_A <- ggplot(
  data = temp_dat %>% dplyr::filter(age_group == "Pediatric"),
  aes(x = Age_Years, y = donor, color = color_label)
) +
  geom_line(
    data = temp_dat %>% dplyr::filter(longgroup == "longitudinal", age_group == "Pediatric"),
    alpha = 0.7,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(pch = 20, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_grid(category_reversed ~ ., scales = "free", space = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Helvetica", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Data set", values = pal1[c(3, 4, 5)]) +
  xlim(c(0, 15))

fig1_A

# Adult panel
fig1_B <- ggplot(
  data = temp_dat %>% dplyr::filter(age_group == "Adult"),
  aes(x = Age_Years, y = donor, color = color_label)
) +
  geom_line(
    data = temp_dat %>% dplyr::filter(longgroup == "longitudinal", age_group == "Adult"),
    alpha = 0.7,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(pch = 20, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_grid(category_reversed ~ ., scales = "free", space = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Helvetica", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Data set", values = pal1[c(6, 8, 7)]) +
  xlim(c(16, 100))

fig1_B

# Save combined Fig. 1B panel
Fig1_B_combined <- annotate_figure(
  ggarrange(fig1_A, fig1_B, widths = c(2, 3)),
  bottom = text_grob("Age (years)", size = 9, family = "Helvetica"),
  left = text_grob("Donor", size = 9, family = "Helvetica", rot = 90)
)

Fig1_B_combined

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(folder_path_save, "Fig1_B.pdf"),
  plot = Fig1_B_combined
)
```
